info.name: Live Quiz Arena - Socket.IO Events
info.description: Postman collection documenting Socket.IO events used by the Live Quiz Arena server. Use WebSocket tooling in Postman or a Socket.IO client to emit/listen to these events.

request.description: Open a WebSocket connection to the server. Note: Socket.IO uses a custom protocol over WebSocket; prefer using a Socket.IO client.
Emit `join-quiz` with a quiz code to join a room. Example payload below is the event body to send via your Socket.IO client.

item.name: joined-quiz (server -> client)
item.description:
Server acknowledgement after joining a room. Example payload:
{ "quizCode": "ABCD123" }

item.name: player-joined (server -> room)
item.description:
Broadcast to room when a player joins. Example payload:
{ "playerID": "<socket.id>" }

item.name: startQuiz (client -> server)
item.description:
Client requests to start quiz for a room. Payload example:
{ "quizCode": "ABCD123" }

item.name: quizStarted (server -> room)
item.description: Server notifies room quiz started. Payload example: {}

item.name: request-quiz (client -> server)
item.description:
Client requests quiz data for given code. Payload example:
{ "quizCode": "ABCD123" }

item.name: quiz-requested (server -> client)
item.description:
Server replies with a wrapper when a quiz is requested. Example payload:
{ "quizCode": "ABCD123", "payload": { /* quiz object or null */ } }

item.name: quiz-data (server -> client)
quiz-error (server -> client)
item.description:
Server error for quiz operations. Example payload:
{ "message": "Quiz not found." }

item.name: quiz-score (server -> client)
item.description:
Server returns score result. Example payload:
{
  "quizCode": "ABCD123",
  "score": 1,
  "total": 1,
  "details": [ { "questionId": 1, "correct": true, "selectedOptionId": "1-def", "correctOptionIds": ["1-def"] } ]
}

item.name: player-submitted (server -> room)
item.description:
Broadcast when a player submits answers. Example payload:
{ "playerID": "<socket.id>", "score": 1, "total": 1 }

item.name: disconnect (socket event)
item.description: Fires when a socket disconnects. No payload.
